name: quarterly-ascension
description: AI middle-managers compete for VP using real Stellar payments via MPP

scripts.deploy:display: [ "$(git branch --show-current)" = "main" ] || { echo 'Refusing: deploy:display must run on main (the Pages project is Direct Upload, so this script uploads whatever is on disk).'; exit 1; } && npx wrangler pages deploy cloud/display/public --project-name=quarterly-ascension --branch=main
